title: kala' #3607
definition:
1) to restrict, restrain, withhold, shut up, keep back, refrain, forbid
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to shut up
        1a2) to restrain
        1a3) to withhold
    1b) (Niphal) to be restrained
    1c) (Piel) to finish
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to shut up

    1c) (Piel) to finish

    NASB:  to shut up, restrain, withhold
